# RSC 2D UI / Interface Map (from the deob'd client)

**Provenance:** auto-generated by an exploration pass over the deobfuscated Java
client at `reference/rsc-client/src/client/` (Mudclient.java, Panel.java,
FontBuilder.java, Surface.java). It is the reference for the **pixel-perfect
React reimplementation** (see [110-react-port.md](110-react-port.md)).

> ‚ö† **Verify before trusting exact numbers.** The deob still has obfuscated
> field names (`qc`, `tg`, `sg`, `Oi`, `Wd`, ‚Ä¶), so some constants below are
> best-effort reads. A few are clearly approximate (e.g. the "min 400px menu
> width" is almost certainly the textWidth accumulator, not a literal min). The
> *structure, colors, sprite groups, and layout regions* are reliable; treat
> single pixel offsets as "confirm against a live frame or the source line."

---

## 1. Screen layout

- Game canvas: **512 √ó 334** (Mudclient.java:1797-1800; `Wd=512`, `Oi=334`).
  Logical height includes 12px bottom padding ‚Üí 346 (Mudclient.java:1695).
- Rendered to AWT with letterboxing at originX/originY (Mudclient.java:2780/2794/2830).

| Region | Position | Size | Notes |
|--------|----------|------|-------|
| World view (3D) | (0,0) | 512√ó334 (effective ~312 wide when panel open) | scene + 2D overlays |
| Right side panel | x‚Čą312‚Äď512 | 200√ó334 | tabs; collapsible |
| Chat tab bar | (0, Oi‚ąí4) | 512√ó18 | chat/quest/private/friends |
| Tab header buttons | (512‚ąí200, 3) | 200√ó32 | 6 buttons, ~32px each |

Side-panel tab buttons (from right edge, Mudclient.java:10889-10930): 6 columns
of width 32, y‚ąą[3,35] collapsed.

## 2. Tab / panel system

`qc` (active side tab), values 0‚Äď6:
`0` collapsed ¬∑ `1` inventory ¬∑ `2` character/design ¬∑ `3` stats/skills ¬∑
`4` friends/ignore ¬∑ `5` magic/prayer (sub-toggle `tabMagicPrayer`) ¬∑ `6` options.

Tab sprites are offsets from `spriteMedia` (`tg`): bg `+1`, header divider `+6`,
bottom border `+22`, chat-bar bg `+23`, compass `+24`.

Chat bottom tabs (Mudclient.java:10478-10508): text at x = 54 / 155 / 255 / 355
(chat/quest/private/friends) + settings @457, y = Oi+6. Active = bright cyan
`0xFFFF32`, blinking = red `0xFF3232`, idle = `0xC8FFFF`; 30-frame blink.

## 3. Fonts & colors

`FontBuilder` rasterizes AWT fonts to packed greyscale-alpha glyphs (9-byte
header: bitmap offset, w, h, x-bearing, y-bearing, advance, line-height; then
row-major alpha). ~6 sizes (0 small ‚Ä¶ 5 huge). Glyphs blitted by
`Surface.drawstring`, which also parses inline `@col@` codes.

Standard colors (hex): white `0xFFFFFF`, green `0x00FF00`, red `0xFF0000`,
yellow `0xFFFF00`, light-blue `0x0088FF`, gray `0x808080`, orange `0xFF8000`.
Inline codes: `@whi@ @red@ @gre@ @yel@ @bla@ @cya@ @or1@ ‚Ä¶` (Surface.drawstring,
~Mudclient.java:3838-3866).

Message colors: public = white, private = light-blue, system = yellow/orange.

## 4. Per-interface specs

### 4.1 Inventory (`qc=1`)
- Bg sprite `spriteMedia+1`; grid origin ‚Čą (264, 36) (Mudclient.java:12093-12142).
- **Cell 49√ó34**, 5 columns √ó 6 rows = 30 slots. Dark-gray dividers between cells.
- Equipped slot: red fill `0xFF0000` őĪ128. Empty: gray fill (~181,181,181) őĪ128.
- Item sprite blitted at slot (48√ó32). Stack count (non-stackable shows count):
  text at (slotX+1, slotY+10), yellow `0xFFFF00`, font 1.

### 4.2 Stats / skills (`qc=3`)
- 18 skills server-side (`world.NumSkills`; deob lists the classic set). Panel at
  x‚Čą313, y‚Čą36, ~196px wide. Rows: name + current/base (+ xp). Levels 1‚Äď99 via
  `experienceTable` (Mudclient.java:2273).

### 4.3 Magic / prayer (`qc=5`, `tabMagicPrayer`)
- Panel x‚Čą313, y=36, 196√ó182 (Mudclient.java:3802-3897). Header 24px split
  Magic|Prayers; list area 90px; description 68px.
- Spell row: "Level N name", `@yel@` have-runes / `@whi@` missing-rune / `@bla@`
  level-too-low. Rune icons drawn from item-sprite atlas at y‚Čą150.
- Prayer row: `@gre@` active / `@whi@` available / `@bla@` too-low; desc = drain rate.

### 4.4 Minimap (`drawUiTabMinimap`, Mudclient.java:3671-3756)
- Panel x‚Čą313, y=3, 156√ó152; map area inset ~40px left. Bg sprite `spriteMedia+2`,
  rotated by `(cameraRotation + jitter) & 0xFF`, zoom 192+jitter.
- Centre dot = local player (white). Dots: scenery cyan `0x00FFFF`, ground items
  red `0xFF0000`, NPCs yellow `0xFFFF00`, players white / green if friend. Compass
  sprite `spriteMedia+24` rotated by cameraRotation+128.

### 4.5 Bank (`drawBank`, Mudclient.java:9066+)
- Centered window; 5-column grid, 49√ó34 cells, variable rows; inventory shown
  alongside for deposit/withdraw. Same color scheme as inventory.

### 4.6 Shop (`drawShop`, Mudclient.java:8862+)
- 5-col √ó variable grid, 49√ó34. Item + price (`0xFFFF00`). Buy/sell verbs.

### 4.7 Trade (`drawTrade`, Mudclient.java:9365+)
- Two grids: your offer (left) + opponent offer (right, x offset ‚Čą +217). 5-col,
  49√ó34. Accept/decline.

### 4.8 Duel (`drawDuel`, Mudclient.java:9886+)
- Parallel to trade: your stake / opponent stake + rule toggles + accept/decline.

### 4.9 Chat area
- Scrollable history above a single-line input; line height ‚Čą12px; per-kind colors
  (¬ß3). Tab switch via `Zh` field; lists rendered by `Panel.render`.

### 4.10 Right-click menu (`drawMenuOptions`, Mudclient.java:11374-11409)
- Box (dark gray, ~őĪ192) with white border. Options: white `0xFFFFFF`, hover
  yellow `0xFFFF00`, font 1, ~6px left pad, ~12px line height. Optional yellow
  title header. (Width = max option textWidth + pad ‚ÄĒ not a fixed 400.)

### 4.11 Health bars (Mudclient.java:10567-10574)
- 30√ó5 over the entity; green `0x00FF00` = remaining, red `0xFF0000` = lost, őĪ192.

## 5. Sprite groups (Mudclient.java:2547-2556)

`spriteMedia`/`tg` = UI chrome; `spriteItem`/`sg` = per-item inventory sprites;
`spriteBaseInventory (+1..10)`, `spriteBaseGroundItems (+11..25)`,
`spriteBaseNpcs (+26..40)`, plus 3D textures. Item id ‚Üí sprite via the item-def
sprite index; per-item width/offset in `TextEncoder.scratchIntArray2[itemId]` and
`Surface.unusedIntsBb[itemId]`. **Serving these to the browser is the key
pixel-perfect enabler ‚ÄĒ see the asset-pipeline task in 110-react-port.md.**

## 6. Key files
`Mudclient.java`: drawInventoryTab `10887`, drawUiTabMinimap `3671`, drawUiTabMagic
`3802`, drawChatHistoryTabs `10478`, drawGameSettings `10964`, drawBank `9066`,
drawShop `8862`, drawTrade `9365`, drawDuel `9886`, drawMenuOptions `11374`.
`Panel.java`: render `1132`, addString/addButton/addBox. `FontBuilder.java`: glyph
rasterization. `Surface.java`: drawstring/drawSprite/drawBox/drawLine*.
